subcodes.first_line: And furthermore, His honor Áqá Mírzá 'Abdu'lláh - upon him be the glory of his Lord - had addressed an epistle unto this servant, and among its contents was this passage [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: و دیگر جناب آقا میرزا عبدالله علیه بهآء ربه مکتوبی باین عبد نوشته بودند از جمله این فقره بود
subcodes.subjects: @business; financial; property matters, @laws of marriage and dowry, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @love and unity
